title: Undertake propagation of medicinal cannabis
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Undertake propagation of medicinal cannabis demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for propagation of medicinal cannabis

pcs.text: Confirm propagation plan, specifications and monitoring schedule with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm propagation plan, specifications and monitoring schedule with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm propagation plan, specifications and monitoring schedule with supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks and implement control measures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks and implement control measures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks and implement control measures.

pcs.text: Prepare self and required approved tools, equipment and materials, including personal protective equipment, according to hygiene and sanitation and health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare self and required approved tools, equipment and materials, including personal protective equipment, according to hygiene and sanitation and health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare self and required approved tools, equipment and materials, including personal protective equipment, according to hygiene and sanitation and health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Select media for propagation method being used and required quantity of plants
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select media for propagation method being used and required quantity of plants?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select media for propagation method being used and required quantity of plants.

pcs.text: Check propagation work area is clean and free of waste on entering secured area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check propagation work area is clean and free of waste on entering secured area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check propagation work area is clean and free of waste on entering secured area.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for propagation of medicinal cannabis

elements.title: Prepare propagation material

pcs.text: Identify, check and record type, quantity and/or weight of propagation material to be used against specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, check and record type, quantity and/or weight of propagation material to be used against specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, check and record type, quantity and/or weight of propagation material to be used against specifications.

pcs.text: Prepare propagation material according to propagation plan and method used
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare propagation material according to propagation plan and method used?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare propagation material according to propagation plan and method used.

pcs.text: Handle propagation material in a way that minimises damage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle propagation material in a way that minimises damage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle propagation material in a way that minimises damage.

pcs.text: Label propagation material according to identification requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Label propagation material according to identification requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Label propagation material according to identification requirements.

pcs.text: Check water and nutrient requirements according to specifications, and adjust manually or use control system to maintain to required levels
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check water and nutrient requirements according to specifications, and adjust manually or use control system to maintain to required levels?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check water and nutrient requirements according to specifications, and adjust manually or use control system to maintain to required levels.

pcs.text: Check temperature, lighting, carbon dioxide and humidity according to specifications, and use control system to adjust and maintain to required levels
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check temperature, lighting, carbon dioxide and humidity according to specifications, and use control system to adjust and maintain to required levels?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check temperature, lighting, carbon dioxide and humidity according to specifications, and use control system to adjust and maintain to required levels.

pcs.text: Record required data and observations according to workplace quality procedures, including any deviations in recorded quantities and weights
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record required data and observations according to workplace quality procedures, including any deviations in recorded quantities and weights?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record required data and observations according to workplace quality procedures, including any deviations in recorded quantities and weights.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check for signs of disease or pests, and if required, apply treatment according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Check climate control, including temperature, lighting, carbon dioxide and humidity levels, according to specification and adjust as required

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check climate control, including temperature, lighting, carbon dioxide and humidity levels, according to specification and adjust as required.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record required data and observations according to workplace quality procedures, including any deviations in recorded quantities and weights.
